Machine Learning Portfolio

Eunseok Lee

Data Specialist focused on trustworthy data systems, applied research, and production delivery.

I work at the intersection of applied machine learning, data engineering, and research delivery. My focus is on turning noisy operational data into measurable systems that stakeholders can trust.

Data Specialist AI ResearcherData EngineerMLOps Engineer
Browse Projects Read Research Open Resume
Working Focus

Systems that stay readable under production pressure.

From data contracts and evaluation design to monitored release workflows, this portfolio is organized as a serious reading surface rather than a one-page marketing page.

Primary Lens Data quality and model reliability
Secondary Lens Research translation into deployable systems
Document Surfaces Print-safe resume and portfolio
System Intro

A data-to-deployment workflow with role clarity at each layer.

The site centers on data systems first, with research and operations framed as connected responsibilities rather than separate identities.

Data Specialist

Raw Data

Instrument sources, define contracts, and profile drift before modeling starts.

Data Engineer

Data Processing

Build versioned transformation layers that preserve lineage and operational trust.

Data Specialist

Feature Layer

Design stable feature definitions with offline and online consistency in mind.

AI Researcher

Modeling

Select methods that fit the signal quality, deployment budget, and evaluation target.

AI Researcher

Evaluation

Measure uplift using clear offline metrics and reviewable failure slices.

MLOps Engineer

Deployment / Monitoring

Ship models with observability, rollback paths, and decision-ready dashboards.

Selected Projects

Case studies with operational context, not just screenshots.

Featured work emphasizes system framing, measurable outcomes, and the boundary between internal contributions and public assets.

Production ML Platform | 2025

Feature Store Quality Gates for Retention Models

Reworked feature validation and promotion rules so retention models could ship on a stable, measurable data contract.

Data Specialist 18% alert precision lift43% fewer schema incidents2x faster release reviews

Research Preview

Applied research and technical notes anchored in delivery concerns.

Internal Research Note | 2025

Data-Centric Evaluation Patterns for Production ML

A practical framework for evaluating production ML systems by treating data quality, cohort stability, and review surfaces as first-class parts of the evaluation loop.

EvaluationData QualityProduction MLObservability
Read Research
Applied ML Workshop | 2024

Failure Slice Analysis for Support Retrieval Systems

Explores how slice-based benchmark construction can reveal failure patterns in technical support retrieval systems that aggregate metrics hide.

RetrievalFailure AnalysisBenchmarking
Read Research
Engineering Note | 2023

Monitoring Considerations for Clinical Risk Model Refreshes

Documents practical monitoring considerations for refreshing clinical risk models with reproducible validation, cohort checks, and reviewer-facing artifacts.

Healthcare MLMonitoringValidation
Read Research
Experience Snapshot

Experience across data platform, applied modeling, and research handoff.

2023 - Present

Senior Data Specialist

SignalGrid Analytics

  • Led a churn prediction platform refresh that improved alert precision by 18% after rebuilding feature quality checks.
  • Introduced model and data monitoring dashboards used by product, analytics, and platform teams.
2021 - 2023

ML Engineer

North Harbor Health AI

  • Built training and evaluation pipelines for clinical risk models with reproducible experiment tracking.
  • Partnered with research and platform teams to move notebook prototypes into scheduled production jobs.
2019 - 2021

Data Engineer

Arcflow Systems

  • Maintained streaming and batch pipelines for operational reporting and downstream recommendation models.
  • Reduced schema break incidents by adding upstream validation and lineage-aware deployment checks.
